documentation:
# htmldiff2 [![Tests](https://github.com/edsu/htmldiff2/actions/workflows/test.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/edsu/htmldiff2/actions/workflows/test.yml) htmldiff2 is a library that uses [difflib], [genshi] and [html5lib] to diff arbitrary fragments of HTML inline. htmldiff2 is a friendly fork of Armin Ronacher's [htmldiff](https://github.com/mitsuhiko/htmldiff) which needed to be upgraded for the [diffengine](https://github.com/docnow/diffengine) project. See [this issue](https://github.com/mitsuhiko/htmldiff/issues/7) for context. ```python >>> from htmldiff2 import render_html_diff >>> render_html_diff('Foo bar baz', 'Foo bar baz') u'
Foo bar baz
' >>> render_html_diff('Foo bar baz', 'Foo baz') u'
Foo bar baz
' >>> render_html_diff('Foo baz', 'Foo blah baz') u'
Foo blah baz
' ``` ## Develop ``` python -mvenv .venv source .venv/bin/activate python -m pip install -e . python test.py ``` ## Publish ``` python -m pip install setuptools build twine python -m build python -m twine upload dist/* ``` [genshi]: https://genshi.edgewall.org/ [html5lib]: https://github.com/html5lib/html5lib-python [difflib]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/difflib.html

modules.name: htmldiff2
documentation:
# htmldiff2 Diffs HTML fragments. Nice to show what changed between two revisions of a document for an arbitrary user. Examples: ```pycon >>> from htmldiff2 import render_html_diff ``` ```pycon >>> print(render_html_diff('Foo bar baz', 'Foo bar baz'))
Foo bar baz
``` ```pycon >>> print(render_html_diff('Foo bar baz', 'Foo baz'))
Foo bar baz
``` ```pycon >>> print(render_html_diff('Foo baz', 'Foo blah baz'))
Foo blah baz
``` ```pycon >>> print(render_html_diff('', ''))
``` ``` copyright 2011 by Armin Ronacher, see AUTHORS for more details. source:2: (INFO/1) Enumerated list start value not ordinal-1: "c" (ordinal 3) license BSD, see LICENSE for more details. ```

functions.name: htmldiff2.diff_genshi_stream
documentation: Renders a creole diff for two texts.

functions.name: htmldiff2.render_html_diff
documentation: Renders the diff between two HTML fragments.

functions.name: htmldiff2.parse_html
documentation: Parse an HTML fragment into a Genshi stream.

functions.name: htmldiff2.longzip
documentation: Like `izip` but yields `None` for missing items.

classes.name: htmldiff2.StreamDiffer
documentation:
A class that can diff a stream of Genshi events. It will inject
`<ins>` and `<del>` tags into the stream. It probably breaks
in very ugly ways if you pass a random Genshi stream to it. I'm
not exactly sure if it's correct what creoleparser is doing here,
but it appears that it's not using a namespace. That's fine with me
so the tags the `StreamDiffer` adds are also unnamespaced.
